title: Create: Netherrack Recipe
description: A simple mod that adds a Create mixing recipe to craft Netherrack from Andesite and Nether Wart.
body:
About the Mod

This is a lightweight, standalone Fabric mod designed for players who want a simple way to automate Netherrack production using the Create mod.

To give you the best experience, this mod comes in three different editions. You can choose the one that best fits your playstyle or modpack difficulty! Please check the Files tab to download your preferred version.

Available Editions & How It Works
Andesite Edition A simple and cheap recipe. You can craft Netherrack by mixing 1x Andesite and 1x Nether Wart in a Basin with a Mechanical Mixer. No heating is required!                                       
![Recipe 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff3e7e756356b6561ea73d2daa5838568f3d8d2f.png)

2. Lava & Cobble Edition A slightly more thematic and advanced recipe. Mix 1x Cobblestone, 1x Nether Wart, and 50mB of Lava in a Basin. No heating is required!                                                                      
   ![Recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c98dade0acc3d1aa9b884470b485ade1746c6dc.png)

3. Complete Edition (Both) Can't decide? This version includes both of the recipes above. You can use whichever ingredients you currently have available.

Dependencies

To use this mod, you must have the following installed:

Fabric API

Create (Fabric)

Credits & Inspiration

This mod was directly inspired by the specific Netherrack recipe from the fantastic Forge mod "Create: Additional Recipes". Full credit for the original recipe concept goes to its creator. This project was made specifically to bring this single, targeted feature to the Fabric community.

Modpacks

You are absolutely free to include this mod in any CurseForge modpack!
